name: request_callback
description: Logs a callback request when the caller cannot be helped immediately and staff need to call them back. Use when the caller prefers a callback, when outside trading hours, or when the query cannot be resolved by the agent.

reason.description: Why the callback is needed — use the caller's own words.

preferred_callback_time.description: When the caller prefers to be called back (e.g. 'tomorrow morning', 'after 3pm'). Leave empty if not specified.

urgency.description: Use 'urgent' only if the caller explicitly says it is urgent or an emergency.
